Apply a likelihod ratio test

Source: R/bootstrap_lrt.R
bootstrap_lrt.Rd

Apply a likelihod ratio test

Usage

bootstrap_lrt(
  W,
  fitted_model,
  null_param,
  n_boot,
  m = NULL,
  recalculate_W0 = FALSE,
  parallelize = FALSE,
  ncores = 1,
  save_models = FALSE,
  verbose = FALSE
)

Arguments

W

An \(n \times J\) matrix of numeric HTS output (e.g., read counts, coverages, etc.)

fitted_model

The model fitted under the alternative

null_param

The model fitted under the null. This could be a modified copy of the model fit under the alternative.

n_boot

The number of bootstrap resamples to perform

m

description

recalculate_W0

Boolean. Should rescaling W. TODO. Defaults to FALSE.

parallelize

Boolean. do you want to parallelize it?

ncores

the number of cores to parallelize over

save_models

TODO

verbose

Do you want to know what I'm doing? Defaults to FALSE.
